phase1_inline_findings.issue: Bind group index out of bounds - tries to use group 4 but pipeline layout only defines groups 0-3
phase1_inline_findings.evidence: Pipeline layout (lines 127-146) creates 4 bind group layouts for groups 0-3. But execute() calls setBindGroup(3, this.cameraBindGroup) and setBindGroup(4, this.polytopeBindGroup). Group 4 doesn't exist.
phase1_inline_findings.impact: WebGPU validation error at runtime, polytope rendering completely broken
phase1_inline_findings.fix: Change lines 633, 634 to: setBindGroup(3, this.polytopeBindGroup) and remove the group 4 call

phase1_inline_findings.issue: Bind group layout declares 'filtering' sampler but creates 'nearest' sampler and uses with unfilterable-float texture
phase1_inline_findings.evidence: Line 183 declares sampler type 'filtering' but line 212-217 creates nearest sampler. This inconsistency may work but is semantically wrong since depth textures with unfilterable-float can't be filtered.
phase1_inline_findings.impact: May cause validation warnings or unexpected behavior on some implementations
phase1_inline_findings.fix: Change bind group layout to use 'non-filtering' sampler type to match the actual sampler usage

phase1_inline_findings.issue: Extensive use of 'as any' type assertions for store access
phase1_inline_findings.evidence: 42+ occurrences of 'as any' found in renderers (WebGPUQuaternionJuliaRenderer, WebGPUPolytopeRenderer, WebGPUBlackHoleRenderer, WebGPUSchrodingerRenderer, WebGPUMandelbulbRenderer)
phase1_inline_findings.impact: Loss of type safety, potential runtime errors if store shape changes
phase1_inline_findings.fix: Define proper interfaces for store types and use typed getters

phase1_inline_findings.issue: TODO: Refactor TonemappingPass to accept configurable input resource
